LanguageData.WULA_Mech_Flyer.description: An autonomous mechanoid force of the Wula Empire. They are typically self-manufactured by higher-level mechanical combat nodes and can steal weapons from enemies using equipped magnetic beams when close.
LanguageData.WULA_Fxxk_Goose.description: A strange mechanoid, seemingly a leftover product from Wula Empire bionic technology experiments, later taken over by mechanoid clusters. They possess the ability to steal weapons from enemies using magnetic weapons—and use them.
